{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# NetworkLocker_x64.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

NetworkLocker_x64.sys is a vulnerable kernel driver from the KeServiceDescriptorTable/vulnerable-drivers repository. The driver exposes dangerous kernel primitives to usermode.
- **UUID**: 0e114b5b-7ec1-4fa3-ac93-e505f986547f
- **Created**: 2026-04-17
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint](https://twitter.com/@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/a982993a68f4aa8789386cedcc1e5b03.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "NetworkLocker_x64.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create NetworkLocker_x64 binPath=C:\windows\temp\NetworkLocker_x64.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start NetworkLocker_x64
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |



### Detections


{{< block "grid-3" >}}
{{< column >}}
#### YARA 🏹
{{< details "Expand" >}}

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/blob/main/detections/yara/yara-rules_vuln_drivers_strict.yar" "Exact Match" >}}{{< tip >}}with header and size limitation{{< /tip >}}

* DbgPrint
* KeEnterCriticalRegion
* KeLeaveCriticalRegion

* MmUnmapIoSpace
* MmAllocateContiguousMemory
* MmFreeContiguousMemory
* IofCompleteRequest
* IoCreateDevice
* IoCreateSymbolicLink

* IoDeleteSymbolicLink

* MmIsAddressValid
